title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART G. CAJUN AND LOUISIANA CREOLE GOODS

AND SERVICES CONSUMER PROTECTION LAW

§4701. Short title

This Subpart shall be cited as the "Cajun and Louisiana Creole Goods and Services Consumer Protection Law."

Acts 2006, No. 124, §1, eff. June 2, 2006.
